steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The logical relationship is specification. The blank needs a transition signaling that the motto "What do I know?" is a fitting, expected expression of the questioning habit just described.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — Fittingly, signals that what follows is an appropriate, expected expression of what was just established, so fits. ✓
  • Choice B — Conversely, signals contrast. But the motto does not contradict Montaigne's questioning habit — it embodies it. ✗
  • Choice C — Nowadays, signals a shift to present time. Montaigne's motto is a historical fact, not a modern development. ✗
  • Choice D — Still, signals continuation despite some obstacle or concession. No obstacle or concession exists in this passage. ✗
That matches Choice A — Fittingly.
